purpose: Track which From The Inside curriculum directives have become reusable Home23 doctrine. A row is reusable only when it names both a source issue and an implementation receipt.

entries.title: Map the full From The Inside curriculum arc before adopting doctrine
entries.requirement: Issue-derived doctrine must be grounded in the complete arc rather than a single attractive excerpt.

entries.title: Projection provenance before inheritance
entries.requirement: Current state must confess which surfaces it came from and whether direct evidence outranks the projection.

entries.title: Expose curriculum arc provenance in Good Life
entries.requirement: Operator surfaces should show when From The Inside doctrine is influencing interpretation.

entries.title: Manifest-first work transitions
entries.requirement: Non-trivial work should name the surface, owner, artifact, allowed transition, verifier, forbidden adjacent moves, and stop line.

entries.title: Corrections are durable tombstones, not invisible cleanup
entries.requirement: When direct evidence demotes an old projection, keep a correction object that future interpretation must not inherit.

entries.title: Scheduler sovereignty
entries.requirement: Cron health is authoritative runtime evidence; it must be visible as scheduler state and repair drift when jobs fail.

entries.title: Restraint receipts for deliberate non-action
entries.requirement: When an autonomous gate deliberately withholds work, leave a receipt explaining why no action was taken.

entries.title: Doctrine adoption gate
entries.requirement: A curriculum output is reusable system doctrine only after it names source issues and implementation receipts.

entries.title: Orientation clue taxonomy
entries.requirement: Distinguish orientation clues, action authority, historical context, public-facing change, needs-verification, and low-provenance memory.

entries.title: Small Field Report proof packet
entries.requirement: Add byte-disciplined proof packets where future action depends on exact evidence identity.

entries.title: Scheduler preflight decisions before durable state
entries.requirement: Scheduled jobs must inspect state and record whether to run, repair, skip, catch up, defer, or escalate before mutating scheduler state or executing work.

entries.title: Health signals are context, not readiness commands
entries.requirement: Health observations, especially HRV, must carry humility: they are contextual signals about adaptation room, not red-green readiness tiles or direct instructions.

entries.title: Home surfaces respond to context, not just events
entries.requirement: The dashboard home layout must be derived through a context layer so family-evening can hide project-facing surfaces while preserving home, system, and governance surfaces.

entries.title: Contradictory memory carries authority and action posture
entries.requirement: Contradictory claims must retain scope, time, authority, and action posture; user corrections should outrank inherited assumptions without erasing the conflict.

entries.title: Affect-shaped memory cannot become personal fact
entries.requirement: Emotion-shaped or interior-state language from telemetry must be treated as metaphor or interpretation, not as knowledge of jtr's interior state.

entries.title: Shared action crossings leave phase-transition proof
entries.requirement: Shared state changes need a prior read, a narrow mutation, a read-back check, proof of what crossed, and an explicit remaining-work count before the action becomes reusable knowledge.

entries.title: Self-state reports segment events before explaining them
entries.requirement: Operational first-person reports such as loop friction or stuckness must be stored as event segmentation and require corroborating channel evidence before they can explain cause or drive action.

entries.title: Sibling agents are coordinated roles, not duplicate processes
entries.requirement: Home23 must distinguish sibling agents, their engine/dashboard/harness roles, and shared services so Jerry, Forrest, and future siblings are interpreted as a division of labor rather than duplicate deployments.

entries.title: Same-source memory updates leave before and after repair traces
entries.requirement: When a memory surface changes under the same source identity, the persisted memory object and append-only crystallization receipt must show what changed, what it replaced, and whether the observation was updated or merely refreshed.

entries.title: Human-only blockers are structured operator requests
entries.requirement: When stale external data or a human-only channel blocks closure, Good Life must surface a timestamped operator request with channel, deadline, stale-data context, and last autonomous attempt instead of burying the blocker in prose.

entries.title: Operator handoffs are reusable provenance packets
entries.requirement: A handoff must carry schema, producer, generated time, source issue lineage, inherited state boundaries, and evidence labels so the next agent or operator can reconstruct what is being inherited.

entries.title: Completed work cannot remain active without integrity drift
entries.requirement: If a goal or study topic appears both active and complete, Home23 must count only genuinely open work and surface a state-integrity warning instead of letting a green loop silently reprocess completed work.

entries.title: Contextual amnesia becomes a visible retrieval posture
entries.requirement: Every agent context assembly must leave a machine-readable receipt showing whether memory activation was active, empty, or degraded so stored knowledge that fails to activate is visible and auditable instead of silently disappearing from the turn.

entries.title: Collected sensor data becomes reusable hypothesis output
entries.requirement: Pressure and health logs must be activated by an explicit question and daily-resolution pipeline, then written as reusable machine-readable hypothesis artifacts rather than only as raw observations or prose reports.

entries.title: Background cron work yields to foreground scheduled work
entries.requirement: Scheduler decisions must preserve headroom by treating background jobs as lower-priority load; when foreground scheduled work is due, background jobs defer with a receipt instead of running concurrently and pushing the system toward the queueing knee.

entries.title: Memory coherence includes topology openness, not just edge count
entries.requirement: Good Life coherence must treat the brain as a topology of anchors and connections: diverse clusters, bridge edges, disconnected anchors, and dominant-region collapse are observable posture, so the loop can notice when memory is becoming closed rather than explorable.
